title: goeppertia amazonica
intro: Goeppertia amazonica, also known as Calathea makoyana, is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae, commonly referred to as a prayer plant due to its unique leaf movement. The plant has been used in traditional medicine in the Amazon region for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Goeppertia amazonica include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea infusions and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
